recovery_overrides.reason: The original multi-power SF9 continuous steps completed individual points but the SX1278 AT session stopped acknowledging the next AT+PWR command. Both steps were rerun successfully after reopening and restoring the radio sessions between power levels.

notes: RX energy uses a deterministic integration window equal to calculated LoRa airtime.
The earlier threshold-selected RX campaign is diagnostic only and is excluded.
Loss results are preserved as measured; isolated packet losses were not cherry-picked away.
